problem id: 01d894fb
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) AND SHL(2)

examples:
  10001101 -> 00100100
  01001001 -> 00000000
  01101100 -> 00100000
  01000111 -> 00011000
  01100101 -> 00000000
  00111111 -> 11111000
  01111001 -> 11000000
  10110111 -> 10011100

query: 01111000
predicted answer: 11000000
